name: Rio Grande Basin
description: The Rio Grande/Río Bravo forms 2,000 km of the US-Mexico border and is heavily over-allocated. Stretches of the river regularly run dry between Albuquerque and El Paso. The 1944 US-Mexico water treaty allocations assume flows that no longer exist. Groundwater pumping from the Hueco Bolson aquifer — serving El Paso and Ciudad Juárez — faces depletion within decades.
